‪Georgina Kent‬  ‪@georginadoodles.bsky.social‬
· 2h
I’ve had many people ask the last couple days if I sell my art, and where. I do sell it, I’ve been a professional artist for the last 5+ years. I sell on Etsy, and on my own Website. The woodpecker I posted on Friday isn’t for sale as it’s for an exhibition, but there will be prints available :)

ESPN reports the Seattle Seahawks will be sold after the Super Bowl on February 8.
Seahawks sale rumors swirl ahead of Super Bowl, Paul Allen's estate denies report
ESPN reports the Seattle Seahawks will be sold after the Super Bowl on February 8. Talks between the team's ownership and the NFL have been ongoing, ESPN reported However, the estate of late owner Paul Allen denies the team is for sale.

‪Peter Marteka‬  ‪@petermarteka.bsky.social‬
· 22h
A wicked cold Tuxis Island sunrise this morning. According to Algonquin Native American legend, a giant named Odziozo formed the island (“Tuxisshoag” or “Tuckshishoag" in native language) when he scooped up rocks from the mainland and flung them into the Long Island Sound. Madison, CT.
